title: Pure Storage ActiveCluster mediator connectivity and witness health
dataSources: Array alerts and status in `purestorage:alert` and `purestorage:array` (ActiveCluster / mediator fields)
app: Pure Storage Unified Add-on for Splunk (5513)
spl:
index=storage (sourcetype="purestorage:alert" OR sourcetype="purestorage:array")
| search mediator OR ActiveCluster OR "witness" OR "tiebreaker"
| eval sev=coalesce(severity, level, priority)
| eval arr=coalesce(array_name, array)
| table _time, arr, sev, component, message, state
description: Loss of the ActiveCluster mediator or witness path risks split-brain protection gaps during site failures. Early detection preserves automatic failover guarantees.
value: Protects synchronous stretch-cluster RPO=0 designs relied on by Tier-0 applications.
implementation: Forward array alert REST feed and syslog duplicates into the same index. Deduplicate on `alert_id` with `stats latest(*) by alert_id`. Page on any mediator-down event outside maintenance.
visualization: Timeline of mediator alerts, table (array, message).

references.title: Pure Storage Unified Add-on for Splunk (Splunkbase)

knownFalsePositives: Short spikes during approved changes, maintenance windows, or known batch jobs can match the rule; confirm against the vendor console and change calendar.
grandmaExplanation: We help you see how your arrays and related gear are doing before small issues turn into full outages or restore surprises.
